message:
🐛 Show fallback placeholder for unknown card types instead of silently dropping (#2721)

Fixes #2648. Six card rendering locations silently returned null when
CARD_COMPONENTS[card_type] was undefined, causing cards to vanish without
explanation. Now all locations render the card inside CardWrapper with an
AlertTriangle icon and "Unknown card type" message so users understand
why a slot appears empty and can remove it.

Files fixed:
- DashboardCards.tsx
- DashboardComponents.tsx
- GPUReservations.tsx
- SortableClusterCard.tsx
- Arcade.tsx
- Deploy.tsx

SharedSortableCard.tsx and CustomDashboard.tsx already had proper
fallback rendering and were left unchanged.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -79,7 +76,15 @@ export const SortableClusterCard = memo(function SortableClusterCard({ } > - + {CardComponent ? ( + + ) : ( +
